description: This pipeline processes an image by first setting all its pixels to a specified color, and then converting a label image to a mask, allowing for further analysis or processing of the resulting masked image.

3bd31644-b8de-491c-86d8-f5a5df306dbe.name: ij1-labels-to-mask
3bd31644-b8de-491c-86d8-f5a5df306dbe.description: Converts a label image to a mask

b43f33cb-c93a-416e-826e-5a7d68952dc0.name: ij1-color-set-to-color
b43f33cb-c93a-416e-826e-5a7d68952dc0.description:
Sets all pixels of the input image to the specified color. If the image is grayscale, the provided color is converted to its equivalent grayscale value.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
